member.name: M:rendezvous_companion.Services.PrintManager.ScanDevicesAsync
member.summary: Get all available devices (USB + Bluetooth combined)

member.name: M:rendezvous_companion.Services.PrintManager.ConnectReceiptPrinterAsync(rendezvous_companion.Services.PrinterDevice)
member.summary: Connect a printer for receipt printing

member.name: M:rendezvous_companion.Services.PrintManager.ConnectKitchenPrinterAsync(rendezvous_companion.Services.PrinterDevice)
member.summary: Connect a printer for kitchen slips

member.name: M:rendezvous_companion.Services.PrintManager.PrintOrderAsync(rendezvous_companion.Models.Order)
member.summary: Print both receipt and kitchen slip for an order

member.name: M:rendezvous_companion.Services.PrintManager.PrintQRAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Print a QR code (e.g. for Tables or Walk-ins). Always prints to all connected printers so one missing printer doesn't block.

member.name: T:rendezvous_companion.Templates.EscPosCommands
member.summary: ESC/POS command builder for 58mm thermal printers (Xprinter XP-58IIH) 384 dots per line, ~32 chars normal, ~16 chars large

member.name: M:rendezvous_companion.Templates.EscPosCommands.OrderItemLine(System.String,System.Int32,System.Decimal)
member.summary: Format an order item line: "Burger 1x P150.00" Total line width = 32 chars for 58mm

member.name: M:rendezvous_companion.Templates.EscPosCommands.QRCode(System.String)
member.summary: Generates ESC/POS commands to print a QR code.

member.name: T:rendezvous_companion.Resource
member.summary: Android Resource Designer class. Exposes the Android Resource designer assembly into the project Namespace.
